name: spawntree-daemon
description: Native daemon resolver and build shim for spawntree

scripts.build: EXT=''; if [ "$(go env GOOS)" = 'windows' ]; then EXT='.exe'; fi; mkdir -p bin && go build -o "bin/spawntreed-$(go env GOOS)-$(go env GOARCH)$EXT" ../../cmd/spawntreed && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: EXT=''; if [ "$(go env GOOS)" = 'windows' ]; then EXT='.exe'; fi; mkdir -p bin && go build -o "bin/spawntreed-$(go env GOOS)-$(go env GOARCH)$EXT" ../../cmd/spawntreed
